## Scope Check

- [ ] The PR stays within the issue scope

## Notes for Claude Code Review

- Review against the GitHub issue as the source of truth
- Check acceptance criteria one by one
- Flag any scope drift, missing verification, or missing documentation
- Confirm the selected workflow type matches the actual task shape
